title: Leadership Sync — Support Coverage Proposal

lines.speaker: Laura Mitchell
lines.text: Let's reduce customer support staffing by 20% to optimize costs heading into next quarter.

lines.speaker: Ravi Patel
lines.text: This could impact our APAC customers. We saw issues last time we touched weekend coverage.

lines.speaker: Jane Smith
lines.text: Agree with Ravi. Incident response capacity might be affected, especially during APAC hours.

lines.speaker: Michael Lee
lines.text: What about running a pilot for 4 weeks before a full rollout?

transcript: Laura Mitchell (00:12): Let's reduce customer support staffing by 20% to optimize costs heading into next quarter. Ravi Patel (00:18): This could impact our APAC customers. We saw issues last time we touched weekend coverage. Jane Smith (00:24): Agree with Ravi. Incident response capacity might be affected, especially during APAC hours. Michael Lee (00:30): What about running a pilot for 4 weeks before a full rollout?
